nasb.text: And she put the skins of the young goats on his hands and on the smooth part of his neck.

esv.text: And the skins of the young goats she put on his hands and on the smooth part of his neck.

cnv.text: 又用小山羊的皮，包在雅各的手上和他頸上光滑的地方。

ccb.text: 再用山羊皮把雅各光滑的手和脖子都包起来，

csbs.text: 又用小山羊的皮，包在雅各手上和他脖子上的光滑处；
